meta.title: Robbins App - Your daily space
meta.description: A calmer daily space for check-ins, morning ritual, and practical next steps in English and Hebrew.

aiActionHelp.question: What does the AI do with my information?
aiActionHelp.dailySteps: The AI uses your goal, blockers, and available time to build a small step.
aiActionHelp.goalStructure: The AI uses your answers, domain, and available time to shape a goal and milestones.
aiActionHelp.insight: The AI analyzes steps, reflections, and blockers to suggest a tailored insight.
aiActionHelp.weeklyReview: The AI reviews your week — what worked, what blocked you, and what to adjust.
aiActionHelp.onboardingInsight: The AI uses your answers to draft an insight before building your goal.
aiActionHelp.onboardingGoal: The AI builds a 90-day goal based on what you shared.
aiActionHelp.onboardingFirstStep: The AI turns your goal into a small first step you can act on.
aiActionHelp.formulationQuestions: The AI uses your goal and context to suggest focused follow-up questions.
aiActionHelp.lifeContextRegenerate: The AI refreshes today's steps for your new context — without erasing progress you marked.
aiActionHelp.skipRecovery: The AI adapts a smaller alternative step based on what blocked the previous one.

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Keep this space yours. Everything here is stored only on this device for now.
settings.displayNamePlaceholder: How should the app greet you?
settings.themeHelp: Choose light or dark mode. Your preference is saved on this device.

settings.coachingImpactBody: This affects when and how your coach suggests tasks.
settings.wakeTimeHelp: The AI will suggest steps starting no earlier than this time.

settings.actionWindowHelp: When it is easiest for you to do daily steps.
settings.availableTimeHelp: Realistic minutes per day for micro-steps.
settings.physicalConsiderationsHelp: Not diagnosis — only to tailor suggestions.
settings.coachingStyleHelp: Choose how your coach communicates with you.
settings.lifeContextHelp: Used to suggest clarification questions — not for diagnosis.
settings.genderHelp: Locks in clarification step 1 after you save.
settings.ageHelp: Locks in clarification step 1 after you save.

dashboard.title: Today, at your pace.
dashboard.subtitle: Start with the next useful step. You do not need a speech. You need a clear place to begin.
dashboard.ritualReadyBody: Take a few focused minutes to settle your system, choose your direction, and enter the day with intention.
dashboard.checkinReadyBody: Your ritual is done. Now give yourself a clean read on your state so the next move feels simpler.
dashboard.latestReflectionEmpty: You have not logged a check-in yet. When you do, the last honest note you wrote will live here.
dashboard.todayFocusFallback: Choose one small clear move you can keep today.
dashboard.todayFocusPlaceholder: What's the one thing that would make today a win?
dashboard.stateSectionTitle: A quiet read of how you're doing
dashboard.stateSectionBody: These markers update from your latest check-in so you can notice the pattern without overthinking it.
dashboard.calmSpaceBody: Breathing, visualization, and a gentler reset are always one step away.
dashboard.lifeCoachBody: Build long-term goals across all life domains and let AI translate them into realistic daily baby steps.
dashboard.settingsBody: Adjust your name and language so the app feels more like yours.
dashboard.prompt: What is the truth you are avoiding right now?

simpleTasks.sectionBody: Define a simple task and tick it off each time you do it. A day only counts once you've completed every time — missed days simply don't advance.
simpleTasks.empty: No daily tasks yet. Add one to get started.
simpleTasks.addTaskExplainer: Opens a quick form to add a one-off task to today's list — without going through goal building.
simpleTasks.stepTimesPerDayHelp: How many times you'll do it each day.
simpleTasks.stepTargetDaysHelp: The number of days you'll fully complete it.
simpleTasks.completedNote: You finished all {total} days. Great work!

health.crisis: Feeling unwell most of the time.
health.stable: Fair overall, with meaningful room to improve.
health.progressing: Healthy and functioning well on most days.
health.thriving: Feeling excellent physically and mentally, consistently.

time.crisis: Days control you — no grip on your time.
time.stable: Getting by, but time slips between tasks.
time.progressing: Managing time well on most days.
time.thriving: Full balance between work, goals, and rest.

career.crisis: Stuck and unhappy with your direction.
career.struggling: Working, but not advancing as you'd like.
career.stable: Stable, but far from your potential.
career.progressing: Advancing and fairly satisfied with your path.
career.thriving: Living the career you truly want.

relationships.struggling: You have connections, but they don't satisfy you.
relationships.stable: Good relationships with room to grow.

mind.struggling: High stress and lack of clarity.
mind.progressing: Focused and in control of most challenges.

spirit.struggling: Feeling lost more often than not.
spirit.stable: A general direction, but not fully clear.
spirit.progressing: Connected to your values and purpose.

house_family.crisis: Home or family in significant distress.
house_family.struggling: Hard to maintain stability and balance at home.
house_family.stable: Manageable, but with tension and gaps.
house_family.thriving: Security, warmth, and stability at home and in family.

lifeCoach.homeBody: Assess the 8 life domains, set meaningful goals, let AI turn them into realistic baby steps, and keep adapting the plan over time.
lifeCoach.setupSectionBody: Life domains, goals, and milestones — set once and update when needed.
lifeCoach.dailySectionBody: Daily steps, weekly review, and insights from your execution.
lifeCoach.authHeading: Sign in to unlock your life executive coach
lifeCoach.authBody: This feature stores your goals, daily actions, reflections, and weekly reviews per user.
lifeCoach.magicLinkSent: Check your email for the sign-in link.
lifeCoach.loadError: Could not load your life coach data. Check the connection and try again.
lifeCoach.cardSetupPrompt: Tap to set up your goals for this area

lifeCoach.onboardingTitle: Let's get started — three simple steps
lifeCoach.onboardingBody: Your life coach turns a big vision into small, doable daily steps. Here's how it works:
lifeCoach.onboardingStep1Body: Start with one area that matters to you — health, career, or any of the 8 areas.
lifeCoach.onboardingStep2Body: Answer a few short questions and the AI builds you a 90-day plan.
lifeCoach.onboardingStep3Body: Get small daily steps, mark what you finished, and build momentum.
lifeCoach.weeklyReviewEmpty: Your first weekly review appears after about a week of activity. Keep marking daily steps — once enough history builds up, you'll get pattern analysis and tailored recommendations here.
lifeCoach.weeklyReviewLockedExplainer: You need at least {minSteps} logged steps or {minDays} active days before the review can be meaningful.
lifeCoach.weeklyReviewPreviewLabel: This is how your review will look
lifeCoach.weeklyReviewWhenWhyTitle: When and why to create a review
lifeCoach.weeklyReviewWhenWhyExplainer: After several active days, the review spots recurring patterns and suggests adjustments.

domainTabs.noGoalHint: No active goal in this area yet — let's set one.
domainTabs.insightsIntro: Weekly review and patterns from your activity — when you want to pause and look back.
domainTabs.newGoalHint: Set a new goal for this domain.

lifeCoach.assessmentTitle: Diagnose the current reality before designing the next year.
lifeCoach.domainScoreExplainer: This isn't a grade on you — it's a compass for prioritization.

health.label: Body & Health
health.description: Energy, sleep, nutrition, fitness, and how your body feels day to day.
health.wheelIntro: Your energy, sleep, nutrition, fitness, and physical feel day to day. Rate how well your body supports the life you want to build.
health.setupValue: Set one health goal — movement, sleep or nutrition — and get a daily plan.

time.label: Time & Discipline
time.description: Managing your day so there is room for family, career, and personal growth without burning out.
time.wheelIntro: Your ability to manage your day so there is room for family, career, and personal growth without burning out. Rate how well you keep priorities, consistency, focus, and discipline even when motivation is low.
time.setupValue: Take control of your day with a time-management goal and small steps.

wealth.label: Money & Abundance
wealth.description: Income, savings, debt, investments, and financial security.
wealth.wheelIntro: Income, savings, debt, investments, and financial security. Rate how stable, managed, and supportive your finances feel.
wealth.setupValue: Build financial stability with a money goal and one daily step.

career.label: Career & Purpose
career.description: Work, professional growth, meaning, and direction.
career.wheelIntro: Your work, professional progress, sense of meaning, and direction. Rate how much your career is moving toward where you truly want to be.
career.setupValue: Advance your career with a clear goal and a visible daily move.

relationships.label: Relationships
relationships.description: Building and maintaining good relationships with the people who matter most in your life.
relationships.wheelIntro: Your ability to build and maintain good relationships with the people who matter most in your life. Rate how much your connections have good communication, trust, support, proactive gestures, and the ability to resolve tension.
relationships.setupValue: Strengthen a key relationship with a goal and small steps of closeness.

mind.label: Mind & Emotions
mind.description: Self-talk, confidence, motivation, anxiety, mood, and limiting beliefs.
mind.wheelIntro: Self-talk, confidence, motivation, anxiety, mood, and limiting beliefs. Rate how much your head and emotions work with you, not against you.
mind.setupValue: Sharpen focus and mental resilience with a daily mind goal.

spirit.label: Meaning & Spirit
spirit.description: Values, vision, faith, gratitude, contribution, and sense of calling.
spirit.wheelIntro: Values, vision, faith, gratitude, contribution, and sense of calling. Rate how connected your life feels to something bigger and meaningful for you.
spirit.setupValue: Reconnect to meaning and inner calm with a spirit goal.

house_family.label: Home & Family
house_family.description: Children, home, family atmosphere, order, and daily responsibility.
house_family.wheelIntro: Children, home, family atmosphere, order, and daily responsibility. Rate how stable, calm, and supportive your home feels.
house_family.setupValue: Bring order and routine to your home with a house & family goal.

fitness.baseline: How many times per week do you work out now?
fitness.target: How many times per week are you aiming for?
fitness.hint: Don't aim too high at first. Adding 1-2 workouts per week is realistic.

sleep.hint: Improving by 30-60 minutes can dramatically change your energy.

nutrition.baseline: How many healthy meals per day now?
nutrition.target: How many healthy meals per day are you aiming for?
nutrition.hint: Start by replacing one meal. Easier than changing everything at once.

weight.hintGain: Gaining about 0.5 kg per week is a realistic sustainable pace.
weight.hintLoss: Losing 0.5-1 kg per week is considered healthy and sustainable.

energy.hint: Energy is a result of sleep, nutrition, and movement. Small improvement in one helps all.

specific_illness.hint: Tracking gradual improvement matters more than aggressive targets.

healthDashboard.vsLastMonthInfo: The difference in completed steps this month compared to last month.

checkin.previewTitle: Your check-in becomes an immediate intervention
checkin.previewBody: The engine matches your current state to a precise affirmation, a reset tool, and one direct action so the check-in ends in motion.
checkin.previewEmptyTitle: Your optimized state will land here
checkin.previewEmptyBody: As soon as you submit, this space will switch from data collection to a targeted affirmation and next move.

driven.label: Driven
driven.description: You feel a strong internal push to move and attack what matters.

laserFocused.label: Laser focused
laserFocused.description: The target is clear and the noise is low. You are ready for deep work.

inspired.label: Inspired
inspired.description: You feel creative, connected to the bigger vision, and open to bold action.

disciplined.label: Disciplined
disciplined.description: You are moving from standards and commitment, not from waiting for the mood.

stressed.label: Stressed
stressed.description: Your body feels pressure and too many demands are landing at once.

stuck.label: Stuck
stuck.description: You know what matters, but there is friction between knowing and starting.

distracted.label: Distracted
distracted.description: Your attention is fragmenting and it is hard to stay on one important thing.

anxious.label: Anxious
anxious.description: Fear of the outcome is creating hesitation, noise, or internal tightening.

exhausted.label: Exhausted
exhausted.description: Your body feels heavy, under-rested, or low on physical fuel.

burntOut.label: Burnt out
burntOut.description: Your mind feels emotionally overdrawn and there is very little reserve left.

apathetic.label: Apathetic
apathetic.description: Nothing feels especially alive right now and it is hard to care.

calm.label: Calm
calm.description: Your breathing is steady and there is enough internal space to choose cleanly.

aligned.label: Aligned
aligned.description: You feel connected to yourself and the day feels coherent instead of forced.

grateful.label: Grateful
grateful.description: You are seeing what is already working and your system feels more open.

lowEnergyLowFocus.title: Your system does not need pressure. It needs ignition.
lowEnergyLowFocus.summary: Low energy and split focus mean the next win is momentum, not complexity. Use one clear spark to get back into motion before the day drifts away from {action}.
lowEnergyLowFocus.action: Use a short activation block, then take the very first visible step toward {action}.
lowEnergyLowFocus.support: You do not need to feel ready. You need one clean movement that wakes the system up.

stressReset.title: Your first move is to lower internal noise.
stressReset.summary: When stress and mental load are high, clarity comes after regulation. Slow the system down, then return to {action} with a cleaner nervous system.
stressReset.action: Take the 60-second reset, then come back and do the smallest true step inside {action}.
stressReset.support: This recommendation protects your bandwidth first so action can come from clarity instead of panic.

peakState.title: You are in a window of power. Direct it.
peakState.summary: High focus and high energy create a rare opening for depth. Protect it and turn it into visible progress on {action} before smaller tasks steal the edge.
peakState.action: Lock {action} as your depth move and start the first deep block now.
peakState.support: Nothing extra is needed here. The job is simply to protect your best state and convert it into output.

groundedClarity.title: You are steady enough to work from clarity.
groundedClarity.summary: This is a strong state to build from. Keep the calm, avoid scattering it, and move {action} forward with deliberate depth.
groundedClarity.action: Use this stable state to create one focused block around {action}.
groundedClarity.support: Grounded energy is leverage. The more protected it is, the more clean output it creates.

rebuildMomentum.title: The move now is to rebuild usable energy.
rebuildMomentum.summary: Your system is asking for fuel, not force. Regain some spark, then return to {action} with a little more life behind it.
rebuildMomentum.action: Take the guided audio reset, then reopen {action} with the smallest possible visible move.
rebuildMomentum.support: This recommendation gives your system enough lift so discipline has something to work with.

steadyAction.title: You are close. Now make the day concrete.
steadyAction.summary: The state is workable. The biggest win is to remove ambiguity and turn {action} into clean execution right away.
steadyAction.action: Choose one exact next step for {action}, then begin before you overthink it.
steadyAction.support: This is the moment to simplify, commit, and let consistency do its work.

guidedAudio.title: Guided audio
guidedAudio.body: Play a short voice-guided reinforcement so the message lands in your body, not just in your thoughts.

breatheReset.title: Breathe & reset
breatheReset.body: Use one guided minute to lower the noise and return to the day from a steadier state.
breatheReset.support: Breathe slowly and let your shoulders drop.

depthWork.title: Depth work
depthWork.body: Protect this state and convert it into one real block of meaningful output.

metrics.energyDescription: Energy is your self-reported capacity right now, scaled from 1 to 10.
metrics.focusDescription: Focus reflects how present and mentally available you feel right now, on a scale of 1 to 10.
metrics.momentumDescription: Momentum blends focus, energy, and state tags into a practical readiness score.

intervention.breath: Take 90 seconds. Stand up, breathe deeply, and change your physical state first.
intervention.truth: Name the truth plainly. Power comes back when the story gets specific.

validation.truthRequired: Share what is really happening so the coaching can be precise.
validation.actionRequired: Name the one action that matters so the optimizer can anchor the recommendation.

analytics.trendHelp: A weekly view of your recent momentum, with the newest day on the right.
analytics.emptyTitle: Your trend will appear after your first check-in.
analytics.emptyBody: As soon as you calibrate one honest state read, this space will help you notice how your rhythm changes over time.

insights.focusCompletion: On days when your focus was high, you completed {percent}% more of your recommended actions.
insights.momentumUp: Your average momentum is up by {points} points compared with the previous week.
insights.momentumDown: Your average momentum is down by {points} points compared with the previous week. This is a signal to simplify and recover.
insights.groundedMomentum: Grounded states showed up {count} times recently. That is usually a strong window for clean execution.
insights.stressSignal: Stress-based tags showed up {count} times recently. More reset moments early in the day may protect your momentum.

page.title: Virtual personal coach
page.subtitle: One honest question, a sharp reflection, and one move — no long chat.
page.emotionLabel: How do you feel right now?
page.escapeHint: 1 = focused, 10 = want to escape the task
page.truthLabel: What truth do you want to work with?
page.truthPlaceholder: e.g. I postponed the call because I feared rejection…
page.truthRequired: Write at least one sentence — the coach works from this.
page.prefilledHint: Prefilled from your latest check-in. Edit before sending.

buildStep.label: Build me a daily step
buildStep.prompt: Build me one concrete daily step from my current goals. Keep it short, practical, and doable today.

shortVersion.label: Give me a short version
shortVersion.prompt: I have low energy today. Give me the shortest useful version of what I should do next, ideally 2-5 minutes.

stuck.label: I'm stuck
stuck.prompt: I feel stuck and avoidant. Help me name the blocker and choose one tiny action that gets me moving.

whyItMatters.label: Remind me why it matters
whyItMatters.prompt: Remind me why my current goal matters and turn that into one grounded next action.

breakGoal.label: Break the goal down
breakGoal.prompt: Take my goal and break it into a clear next baby step, a small milestone, and what I should ignore today.

coach.title: Coach response
coach.error: Could not get coaching right now. Try again in a moment.
coach.responsePreview: A clear read on what is happening, and one grounded next move.
coach.languageBadgeHelp: This shows the response language selected for coaching.
coach.mixedContent: Your reflection will appear here after your next check-in.

responses.metrics: State read: escape is {escape}/10 and energy is {energy}/10. That is data, not identity.

driven.insight: Good. You have drive. Now aim it at the real target: “{truth}”. Power without precision becomes noise.
driven.action: Do one concrete thing in the next 10 minutes that proves you are in command.

flat.insight: Flat is not broken. It is usually a body asking for motion and a mind asking for a smaller first win: “{truth}”.
flat.action: Stand up, breathe deeper than feels necessary, and complete the smallest visible action.

anxious.insight: Anxiety is energy without a decision. The decision starts here: “{truth}”. Make it specific and it loses volume.
anxious.action: Write the next move in one sentence, then do only that. No future-tripping for 10 minutes.

avoidant.insight: Avoidance is not laziness. It is fear negotiating with your standards. The door back in is “{truth}”.
avoidant.action: Face the thing for 90 seconds. Open the tab, make the call, write the first line. Start before confidence arrives.

disappointed.insight: Disappointment means you still care. Use it cleanly: “{truth}”. Do not turn a result into an identity.
disappointed.action: Extract one lesson, choose one repair, and move before the story gets heavier.

excited.insight: Excitement is fuel. Give it rails: “{truth}”. Energy becomes power when it gets a target.
excited.action: Pick the one move that creates visible progress today and put it on the calendar now.

overwhelmed.insight: Overwhelm is usually too many open loops shouting at once. Start with this one: “{truth}”.
overwhelmed.action: Write three next actions, circle the smallest, and do that before you solve the whole life.

confused.insight: Confusion often means you need a cleaner question. The current signal is “{truth}”.
confused.action: Ask: what is the next true thing I can verify? Then take that step only.

angry.insight: Anger is boundary energy. Aim it at standards, not damage: “{truth}”.
angry.action: Name the boundary, choose the clean request, and deliver it without theatrics.

grateful.insight: Gratitude is not passive. It is a strong state to build from: “{truth}”.
grateful.action: Use the state. Send the message, make the move, or finish the task while your system is open.

history.empty: Your recent check-ins will gather here once you begin.

help.intro: The app turns a fast emotional check-in into a practical next move — and helps you build a personalised life coaching plan.
help.step1: You score energy and avoidance so the app can estimate focus and momentum.
help.step2: You name one honest truth. That gives the coach something specific to work with.
help.step3: The coach response gives one insight, one intervention, and one challenge.
help.step4: Trends, history, exports, and follow-ups help you build a feedback loop over time.

faq.a: All data is stored locally on this device. Nothing is sent to a server. You can export or clear it at any time from the Admin page.

faq.q: What is the Life Coach section?
faq.a: The AI Life Coach helps you set goals across 8 life domains (health, career, relationships, etc.) and generates daily micro-steps tailored to your energy and schedule.
A short guided sequence (5–15 min) covering breathing, gratitude, affirmations, and daily mission — inspired by Tony Robbins' priming method.

faq.q: Why does the coach speak to me differently sometimes?
faq.a: Your coaching style setting controls this. Choose between Supportive, Direct, and Motivational in Settings → Coaching Preferences.

faq.q: Can I use the app in Hebrew and English?
faq.a: Yes. Switch the language at any time from the header or Settings page. All generated content will follow the selected language.

faq.q: How do I reset or delete my data?
faq.a: At the bottom of the Help page, use Reset data — it clears everything saved about you on this device and returns you to first-time onboarding. You can also manage individual records under Admin → Database.

help.contactBody: This is a personal productivity app. If something isn't working as expected, try refreshing the page or clearing your browser cache.

privacy.title: Privacy note
privacy.body: This prototype stores check-ins locally in your browser. A production version must add encrypted storage, privacy policy, terms, and clear consent before saving sensitive emotional data to a server.
privacy.intro: This prototype handles emotionally sensitive information with a local-first posture.
privacy.local: Check-ins, drafts, reminder preferences, and coaching history are stored locally on this device through browser storage and the app's local database.
privacy.analyticsControl: Optional behavioral insights can be disabled in Settings. Core coaching continues without passive writing, editing, task-view, and locally inferred text-pattern analytics.
privacy.server: The current coach API returns a local fallback response. If cloud AI is connected later, consent, retention rules, and deletion controls must be added before launch.
privacy.security: Production must use HTTPS, encrypted storage, access controls, audit logging, and clear data deletion flows.
privacy.contact: This page is product guidance, not legal advice. Final launch needs reviewed legal text.

terms.intro: This app is a coaching prototype, not medical, mental-health, legal, or financial advice.
terms.use: Use the coaching responses as reflection prompts and action planning support.
terms.limits: Do not rely on the app for distress or crisis situations. In those cases, seek human support outside the app.
terms.data: Do not enter information you are not comfortable storing locally in this browser during prototype testing.
